extractions.claim: PDD Holdings TTM revenue through Q3 2025 is approximately $57.3B
extractions.evidence: PDD Holdings revenue for the twelve months ending September 30, 2025 was $57.327B, a 9.63% increase year-over-year. Q3 2025 total revenues were RMB 108,276.5 million (US$15.2 billion), up 9% YoY.

verification.verifier_notes: Revenue data confirmed from PDD investor relations and MacroTrends. TTM calculated from quarterly filings.

extractions.claim: PDD FY2024 total revenue was RMB 393.8 billion ($54.0 billion), up 59% YoY
extractions.evidence: Total revenues for fiscal year 2024 were RMB 393,834.6 million (US$53,965.7 million), an increase of 59% from RMB 247,639.0 million in 2023.

verification.verifier_notes: From PDD Holdings FY2024 earnings release and 20-F filing.

extractions.claim: PDD blended take rate rose from ~6.3% in 2023 to ~8.6% in 2024, driven by Temu's gross revenue recognition
extractions.evidence: Analysts estimate PDD's blended take rate increased from 6.3% in 2023 to approximately 8.6% in 2024. Revenue CAGR of 17% outpaces GMV CAGR of 12%, implying continued take rate expansion. Transaction services revenue surged +124% in 2024, with Temu contributing ~70% of transaction services revenue.

verification.verifier_notes: Blended take rate = Total Revenue / Total GMV. The increase is partly artificial because Temu's fully-managed model books gross revenue (1P-like), inflating the numerator relative to a pure marketplace take rate. Domestic Pinduoduo take rate is estimated at ~4-5%.

extractions.claim: PDD cash and short-term investments reached RMB 423.8 billion ($59.5B) by Q3 2025, surpassing Alibaba
extractions.evidence: By Q3 2025, PDD's cash and short-term investments reached RMB 423.8 billion ($59.5 billion), surpassing Alibaba's cash reserves for the first time.
